Ntc Of Mtn For Order Compelling Responses To Written Interrogatories, Req. For Documents And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-21-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling re Plaintiff YP ADVERTISING LP'S Motion for Order Compelling Responses to Written Interrogatories, Request for Documents and for Sanctions. Motion to compel responses to Interrogatories is granted as it is not opposed. Sanctions in the sum of $610.00 are awarded to moving party. Prevailing party to submit a form of order. Judge Pro Tem: Steven B. Stein; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
